resolution_strategy: Run tasks sequentially and keep file ownership narrow. Treat existing uncommitted spec/doc changes as intentional baseline.

decisions.risk: Multiple edits target Game content extraction/data/blind_boxes.py.
decisions.decision: Plan IMPL-1 and IMPL-2 sequentially; do not parallelize data edits.

decisions.risk: hanging field may tempt low-quality filler.
decisions.decision: Keep hanging as a compatibility bucket but only map safe scene expansion/support objects, allowing conservative candidate count.
Include a final docs task that updates all required docs after code/tests stabilize.
